channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-10 20:26 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Tell your Senator that you want voting integrity passed. Every other country has this!
item.description: Tell your Senator that you want voting integrity passed. Every other country has this!

item.title: @elonmusk: Thune needs to sings a different tune
item.description: Thune needs to sings a different tune

item.title: @elonmusk: And it will forever be appalling to me that a bunch of celebrities with influence over young people ...
item.description: And it will forever be appalling to me that a bunch of celebrities with influence over young people used their platforms to amplify unevidenced claims for the benefit of transitioning minors while smearing those urging caution as bigots.

item.title: @elonmusk: Share your best Grok Imagine prompts! Most people don’t know how, so this will help them.
item.description: Share your best Grok Imagine prompts! Most people don’t know how, so this will help them.

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Grok has surpassed 2.5 billion website visits.
item.description: BREAKING: Grok has surpassed 2.5 billion website visits.

item.title: @elonmusk: First, a new city. Next, a tech-forward, community-first police department. Starbase is hiring a Pub...
item.description: First, a new city. Next, a tech-forward, community-first police department. Starbase is hiring a Public Safety Director/Future Chief of Police to build it. Details -->shorturl.at/ZAtqr

item.title: @elonmusk: We either fix the integrity of America's elections, or we won't have a country left to fight for. DE...
item.description: We either fix the integrity of America's elections, or we won't have a country left to fight for. DEMAND the Senate pass the SAVE AMERICA ACT 📲SaveAmerica.Gov

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨NEW: ICE has arrested a Mauritanian national accused of illegally voting in seven U.S. federal elec...
item.description: 🚨NEW: ICE has arrested a Mauritanian national accused of illegally voting in seven U.S. federal elections since 2008. Mahady Sacko, who was living in Pennsylvania, allegedly voted in the 2008, 2012, 2016, 2020, and 2024 elections, according to court documents. Prosecutors say he lied about being a U.S. citizen each time he voted. He cast ballots in person in most elections and even voted by mail in 2020. Cases like this are exactly why supporters say the Save America Act is needed — to require proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is just Grok Imagine 1.0. I can only imagine what it will look like in a year from now.
item.description: This is just Grok Imagine 1.0. I can only imagine what it will look like in a year from now.

item.title: @elonmusk: Using the talking filibuster to pass the SAVE America Act would be a time-consuming endeavor That is...
item.description: Using the talking filibuster to pass the SAVE America Act would be a time-consuming endeavor That isn’t a bug; it’s a feature Time + public attention = recipe for success on an 85-15 issue

item.title: @elonmusk: Is there a more hypocritical company than Anthropic?
item.description: Is there a more hypocritical company than Anthropic?

item.title: @elonmusk: Anthropic's Claude helped select hundreds of targets for the opening wave of Iran strikes. There's a...
item.description: Anthropic's Claude helped select hundreds of targets for the opening wave of Iran strikes. There's a good chance that one of them was the elementary school where more than 100 girls died. My latest@NonzeroNewspiece.nonzero.org/p/iran-and-the-i…

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
